ogTitle: Waratah Bay vs Wareek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Waratah Bay and Wareek.
heading: Waratah Bay vs Wareek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Waratah Bay, Victoria and Wareek, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Waratah Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Wareek (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Waratah Bay or Wareek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Waratah Bay has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Wareek scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Waratah Bay scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Wareek scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Waratah Bay or Wareek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Waratah Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
